nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲律宾三趾鹑
nodes.summary: 菲律宾三趾鹑（Turnix ocellatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Spotted buttonquail。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Spotted buttonquail
nodes.summary: The spotted buttonquail (Turnix ocellatus) is a species of bird in the family Turnicidae. It is endemic to Philippines on the island of Luzon. Description They exhibit sexual dimorphism in which males whiter heads with females having darker heads. Ecology and behavior Not much is known about its diet and breeding habits. It is presumed to feed on grass, seeds, young plant shoots and invertebrates. It has been recorded breeding in February to August. Females are polyandrous and mate with multiple males. Nest is a hole on the ground lined with leaves and sticks. Lays 2 to 4 white eggs with gray or purple speckles. Habitat and conservation status Its habitat is poorly known, but it is found in many habitat types such as brushy grassland, dry forest with bamboo, rice fields and gardens up to 2,200 meters (7,200 ft) above sea level. IUCN has assessed this species as Least-concern but the population may still be effected by urbanization and hunting. References

nodes.name: 三趾鹑科
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑科（Turnicidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Sumba buttonquail、Black-rumped buttonquail、Fynbos buttonquail等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: 三趾鹑属
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑属（Turnix）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Red-backed buttonquail、棕三趾鹑、Spotted buttonquail等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
